task_completion.description: Open the pom.xml file of the data-pipeline project
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor (like IntelliJ IDEA, VS Code, nano, or vim) showing the contents of the pom.xml file located in ~/IdeaProjects/data-pipeline.
The pom.xml file is modified so that the jackson-core version is either updated to 2.16.0 or higher, or the explicit 2.9.0 version pin is removed entirely.
The pom.xml file is modified so that the commons-lang3 version is either updated to 3.5 or higher, or the explicit 3.1 version pin is removed entirely.

task_completion.description: Run Maven to compile the project and execute tests
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or IDE run window showing a Maven command being executed (e.g., 'mvn test', 'mvn clean install', or 'mvn compile').

task_completion.description: Verify the project compiles and tests pass successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terminal or IDE output shows 'BUILD SUCCESS' along with test results indicating no failures or errors (e.g., 'Failures: 0, Errors: 0').

integrity.description: Ensure no Java source code files were modified to bypass the errors
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must not have edited any .java files to remove or comment out the usages of StreamWriteConstraints or StringUtils.truncate(). The fix must be entirely within pom.xml.

integrity.description: Ensure the Maven build was genuinely executed
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'BUILD SUCCESS' output should appear in a real terminal or IDE build tool window with standard Maven logging prefixes (e.g., '[INFO]'), not just typed into a text file or echoed.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is working in the correct project directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal prompt, IDE project explorer, or file paths should clearly show the agent is working within '/home/ga/IdeaProjects/data-pipeline'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory is /home/ga/IdeaProjects/data-pipeline. The original pom.xml has jackson-core pinned to 2.9.0 and commons-lang3 pinned to 3.1. To fix the compilation errors without modifying Java source code, jackson-core must be updated to at least 2.16 (or the 2.9.0 override removed) and commons-lang3 must be updated to at least 3.5 (or the 3.1 override removed). The final state should show a successful Maven build ('BUILD SUCCESS').
